children.heading: .—Prohibition
children.label: a .—Prohibition
children.text: Except as authorized by this chapter or the Secretary of Transportation, a person may not manufacture, sell, possess, or display a decoration or medal provided for in this chapter.

children.heading: .—Civil Penalty
children.label: b .—Civil Penalty
children.text: A person violating this section is liable to the United States Government for a civil penalty of not more than $2,000.
